deleteDocFailed: Failed to delete linked document block
trashNotebookFailed: Failed to create or locate the "垃圾箱" notebook
moveToTrashFailed: Failed to move document to recycle bin
docBlockHeadingLevel: Heading level for new document blocks
docBlockHeadingLevelDesc: Heading level when creating document blocks; choose Paragraph for no heading
fileTreeClickToggle: Single-click file tree to open and expand/collapse
fileTreeClickToggleDesc: SiYuan opens the doc on row click; if the row shows an expand toggle, trigger SiYuan's own expand/collapse (no custom getLeaf)
autoClearTrashOnStartupDesc: After SiYuan starts, automatically delete unreferenced documents in "垃圾箱"
debugReconcileDesc: Print move/reconcile source and processed/skip counts in console to troubleshoot sync issues
clearTrashNowDesc: Scan the recycle notebook and delete documents not referenced by any document block (uses SiYuan delete, undoable)
